basic_details.job_title: AMMB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Peon and Watchman Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Adarsh Mahila Mahavidyalaya, Bhiwani (AMMB) has officially announced the Peon and Watchman Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 June 2026 at the official AMMB website. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria and possess the required educational qualifications as mentioned in the official notification can now submit their online applications from 13 June 2026 to 03 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AMMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AMMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AMMB recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AMMB Peon and Watchman posts is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Peon and Watchman posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Adarsh Mahila Mahavidyalaya, Bhiwani. This includes 2 posts for Peon and 1 post for Watchman.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the AMMB recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Peon and Watchman posts at AMMB will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 500/-. However, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for AMMB recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q7. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application portal opens on 13-06-2026, and the closing date for submission is 03-07-2026. Mark these dates to avoid missing the application window.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The specific minimum qualification details for the Peon and Watchman posts are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for precise educational requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit details for the Peon and Watchman posts are not specified in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for information on minimum and maximum age limits.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through offline mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is exclusively online. Offline applications will not be accepted. Ensure you complete the entire process via the official AMMB website.
